text:
ByTim Chan

There’s no shortage ofOlympic merch onlineright now, asTeam USA athletes compete in Paris, but one particular collaboration is going viral for bringing back a retro cartoon series.

Target has introduced aLooney Tunes Olympics collection, which pairs the beloved characters from the animated series with Team USA and sporting motifs. The officially-licensed collection is selling quickly, with sizes for kids and adults, along with multiple colorways. Pricing starts from $14 and a number of pieces are on sale right now at up to 27% off. We’ve rounded up some of the bestsellers below and you can shop the entire Target x Looney TunesOlympicsmerch capsule onTarget.com.

$14.00

The classic white tee gets a fresh upgrade with this Target offering, which features Bugs Bunny peeking out from underneath an American flag and the Olympic rings logo. This unisex tee is available in sizes XS to 3XL. At just $14, this is an easy pickup to wear through the Olympic Games and beyond.

$21.98$29.9927% off

Target’s new Looney Tunes Olympics collection also includes multiple graphic tees, like this one, which features the familiar animated characters showing off their favorite sports (think Bugs Bunny as a skateboarder and the Tasmanian Devil showing off his speed on the soccer field). This T-shirt is currently on sale and in stock in sizes small to 3XL for boys, girls, men and women.

$21.98$29.9927% off

Shoppers also love this Team Tweety T-shirt, which shows off the fan-favorite cartoon character taking to the basketball court. While you can wear this tocheer on LeBron James and co.at the Olympics, the motto “Be Fearless” is a good reminder to live by all year round. We’re partial to this heather grey colorway (which has a cool, worn-in look) but you can choose from multiple colors online.

$17.99

We like the simple yet effective graphic on this T-shirt, which features Bugs, the U.S. flag and the Olympics rings against a bold red backdrop. It’s a stylish way to show off your support for Team USA and a fresh take on red, white and blue. Available for just $17.99, this is an easy purchase at Target too.

$29.99$40.0025% off

Target’s Looney Tunes Olympics collection also includes some fun accessories, like this Team USA backpack, which features a print of all the Looney Tunes characters and their favorite sports. The backpack measures 16” x 12” x 5” and features a front zip pocket, main compartment and a built-in laptop sleeve. This is an online exclusive, meaning you won’t find it in stores. The only place to buy this backpack is onTarget.com.

We want to hear it. Send us a tip using our anonymous form.

title: Target Looney Tunes Team USA Olympic Merch: Shop $14 T-Shirt Online
author: Tim Chan
description: Target has introduced a Looney Tunes Olympics collection which pairs the beloved characters from the animated series with Team USA and sporting motifs
